metadata.description: DCIK — Dorsolateral Contrary Inference Katabasis. Adversarial analysis for Claude Code: a 178-perspective review skill, plus /decide, a cross-model Decision Interview aimed at the human's reasoning for high-stakes decisions.

plugins.name: dcik
plugins.description: DCIK adversarial analysis + /decide cross-model Decision Interview. Install with /plugin marketplace add oxygn-cloud-ai/dcik then /plugin install dcik@dcik-marketplace
